text: one research crew, five agents, each with its own API key, one shared embedcache
worker-1  embed("how do vector databases enable ret...")
X-Embedcache-Status: miss   worker-1 computes it once
worker-2  embed("how do vector databases enable ret...")   # same sub-question, different agent
X-Embedcache-Status: hit    worker-2 reuses it free (11 tokens saved)
different agent, different key, same content -> one upstream call
worker-3  embed(novel inputs...)   # key capped at 40 tokens
HTTP 429 Too Many Requests   worker-3 hit its 40-token budget
planner-key still served normally (HTTP 200, miss) - only the runaway agent is capped
